case.title: ARISTEGUIETA v. FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF NEW YORK

opinion.h1: ARISTEGUIETA v. FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF NEW YORK, 375 U.S. 48 (1963)
opinion.h4: ARISTEGUIETA, CONSUL GENERAL OF THE REPUBLIC OF VENEZUELA, v. FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF NEW YORK ET AL. CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE FIFTH CIRCUIT. No. 1. Decided October 21, 1963.
opinion.p: Judgment vacated and case remanded to District Court with instructions to dismiss the cause as moot.
John A. Wilson, Alexis C. Coudert and Melber Chambers for respondents.

The motion to vacate the judgment is granted. The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded to the United States District Court for the Southern District of Florida with instructions to dismiss the cause as moot.
MR. JUSTICE WHITE took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
